    Methods in microsim.simulation.component.processor with parameters of type Processor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    Decoder.decode(Processor proc, int inst)
    Decodes an instruction into a sequence of microops, and queues them to a processor instance.
    static void
    BusInterface.doReadRoutine(Processor proc, int addr, int byteSelect)
    Starts a read routine.
    static void
    BusInterface.doWriteRoutine(Processor proc, int addr, int data, int byteSelect)
    Starts a write routine.
    (package private) void
    MicroOp.execute(Processor proc)
    Executes a microop on a processor instance.
    (package private) static int
    MicroOp.getAddrL(Processor proc, int inst)
    Gets the address for load instructions.
    (package private) static int
    MicroOp.getAddrS(Processor proc, int inst)
    Gets the address for store instructions.
    (package private) static int
    MicroOp.getShamt(Processor proc, int inst)
    Get shift amount for shift instructions.
    private static void
    BusInterface.readRoutine(Processor proc)
    Emits sequence of microops to perform a read on a processor queue.
    private static void
    BusInterface.writeRoutine(Processor proc)
    Emits sequence of microops to perform a write on a processor queue.
